import argparse, os, json, numpy as np

SEQ_LEN=96; PRED_LEN=720; N_FEAT=7

def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument('--data_path', required=True)
    ap.add_argument('--checkpoint', required=True)
    ap.add_argument('--output', required=True)
    args = ap.parse_args()
    ckpt_dir = os.path.dirname(args.checkpoint)
    mean = np.load(os.path.join(ckpt_dir,'mean.npy'))
    std = np.load(os.path.join(ckpt_dir,'std.npy'))
    # checkpoint is the .npy of weights [C,L,P]
    W = np.load(args.checkpoint)  # [C,L,P]
    x = np.load(os.path.join(args.data_path,'test_windows.npy')).astype(np.float32)
    # normalize
    xn = (x - mean)/std  # [N,L,C]
    last = xn[:, -1:, :]  # [N,1,C]
    xnr = xn - last  # [N,L,C]
    # predict per channel
    preds = np.zeros((x.shape[0], PRED_LEN, N_FEAT), dtype=np.float32)
    for c in range(N_FEAT):
        Xc = xnr[:,:,c]  # [N,L]
        Pc = Xc @ W[c]  # [N,P]
        preds[:,:,c] = Pc + last[:,0,c:c+1]
    # un-normalize
    preds = preds * std + mean
    with open(args.output,'w') as f:
        json.dump({'predictions': preds.tolist()}, f)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
